author: doll-agent
content:
Done. memmap.rs had only one 2-D test (the view test from #496); every other memmap test was 1-D. Added 6 tests covering 2-D and 3-D shapes across all access modes:

- memmap_readonly_2d_shape_and_data: 3x4 f64.
- memmap_readonly_3d_shape_and_data: 2x3x4 i32.
- memmap_readwrite_2d_persists: 2x3 f64 with cell modification + flush; verifies on-disk persistence and isolation of surrounding cells.
- memmap_view_3d_strides_match_row_major: 2x3x4 view; iterator reconstructs original sequence (validates stride[k] = product(shape[k+1..])).
- memmap_open_memmap_2d_readonly: numpy-shaped entry point.
- memmap_copy_on_write_2d_isolates_changes: CoW writes stay in memory.

ferray-io: 103 -> 109 passing, clippy clean. Commit 559c4036.
